reeves-client.name: Reeves Client
module.reeves-client.fps_counter.desc: Displays your current frames per second.
module.reeves-client.fps_graph.desc: Live graph of your FPS and frametime history.
module.reeves-client.cps_counter.desc: Displays left and right click counts per second.
module.reeves-client.coordinates.desc: Shows your current X, Y, Z position.
module.reeves-client.direction.desc: Shows the cardinal direction you are facing.
module.reeves-client.armor_status.desc: Displays equipped armor pieces and durability.
module.reeves-client.potion_effects.desc: Shows active potion effects and their remaining durations.
module.reeves-client.keystrokes.desc: Displays WASD, jump, and sneak key presses.
module.reeves-client.session_timer.desc: Tracks how long you have been playing in this session.
module.reeves-client.toggle_sprint.desc: Automatically holds sprint so you don't have to hold the key.
module.reeves-client.toggle_sneak.desc: Toggles sneaking with a single key press.
module.reeves-client.chat_enhancements.d: Timestamps, chat filters, and copy improvements.
module.reeves-client.waypoints.desc: Place custom 3D waypoints in the world.
Manage and quickly view your screenshots.
module.reeves-client.entity_render.desc: Control entity render distance and culling to improve FPS.
module.reeves-client.particle_reducer.de: Reduce or hide particle effects for better performance.
module.reeves-client.skill_tracker.desc: Track SkyBlock skill XP and progress.
module.reeves-client.slayer_tracker.desc: Track slayer XP, kills, and quest progress.
module.reeves-client.minion_tracker.desc: Track placed minions and their production.
module.reeves-client.garden_dashboard.de: Garden statistics, visitor tracking, and farming progress.
module.reeves-client.dungeon_stats.desc: Track dungeon runs, scores, and performance.
module.reeves-client.skyblock_calendar.d: Shows current SkyBlock date, season, and upcoming events.
module.reeves-client.auction_house.desc: Browse and search Auction House data.
module.reeves-client.profit_calculator.d: Calculate farming, crafting, and flipping profits.
module.reeves-client.goal_tracker.desc: Set and track personal SkyBlock goals.
module.reeves-client.economy_tooltips.de: Shows Bazaar buy/sell prices in item tooltips.
module.reeves-client.item_protection.des: Lock items to prevent accidental dropping, selling or salvaging.
module.reeves-client.dungeon_hud.desc: On-screen dungeon score, secrets, deaths and crypts.
module.reeves-client.dungeon_rooms.desc: Identifies the current dungeon room and displays known secret locations.
module.reeves-client.dungeon_secrets.des: Shows waypoints for known secret locations. Player must interact with all secrets themselves.
module.reeves-client.dungeon_party.desc: Displays party member class and performance stats.
module.reeves-client.dungeon_score.desc: Tracks current run score and estimates final grade.
module.reeves-client.crosshair.desc: Customize crosshair style, size, color, and gap.
module.reeves-client.hit_effect.desc: Customize hit color and particle effects.
module.reeves-client.cape_manager.desc: Upload and manage your Reeves Client custom cape.
